ok good point since i see a case
the poison of her 3 cost scales off atk. heal fro rouse and 3 cost from con
each char has their own stat
team max hp is based on the total con of chars in your team
other team wide stats are sigil yield, death res, dmg amp, realm mastery. each char contribute a different amount of those from their personal stat and their wheels and covs
